item.title: A Disney themed Dump that amounts to the same price as a ticket to Disneyland
item.description:
Kathryn Beaumount - Alice in Wonderland
Marge Champion was a dancer and the uncredited live-action model for Snow White, whose movements served as a reference for the animators. She also later became the stepmom of actress Katey Sagal (Married With Children, Futurama, etc)
Auliʻi Cravalho singing "How Far I'll Go" in her Native Hawaiian https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QYEwdSujM_c
with a young Raven-Symoné in a 1990 television special "The Muppets at Disney World". This was the final time that Jim Henson would ever sing the Rainbow Connection, he sadly passed away a week after this aired.
https://www.instagram.com/labskamino/ https://www.artstation.com/sigmatron
Full clip: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=C1EtQki7hKk
with co-star Sean Naegeli, who played 5yr old Mowgli in the beginning of the film
The creators/writers/voice actors of "Phineas & Ferb" and "Gravity Falls", respectively.
The Lion King - Can You Feel the Love Tonight? (Zulu) https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Wjt9pdnJ-9I
from Disney's Gargoyles
Artist source: https://www.tumblr.com/earthnashes
My 10th favorite - https://imgur.com/gallery/Au9bGWU
Source (by HumorSwings): https://www.youtube.com/shorts/CC5YNKkz2QU
"Who's next?"
Source: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ejPK0m9ZDPo
Dr. Bunsen Honeydew accidently slipped him the "Mister Hyde" formula
The animators didn't think we'd notice that Nani goes commando
item.dc:creator: Pasquinel

item.title: The only German soldier ever to get a memorial made by Americans
item.description: Friedrich died at 23 to save the life of an American soldier badly wounded in a minefield in 1944. Friedrich told his men to cease fire and let the Americans come get him. But they never did, an hour went by, and he decided to go try save the American soldier. With a medic team behind. He got close, but stepped on a mine himself and died at the hospital later on. His country would shame him for this act of putting his life at danger for the enemy,but the Americans gave respect
item.dc:creator: sMarbleWrecker

item.title: DnD Meme mini-dump, plus an Adventure!
item.description:
Enjoy a few memes I made *edit: FP already? Thanks! If you're a DM, make sure to grab the adventure at the end!
5e isn't made for this, but someone will try.
Best party name?
It me.
Interview with a Player
Nom
Whose party has tried to start a revolution? *raises hand*
I also write little adventures that fit on a single page! Here's a sample. Not a big shot company, just a guy that shares easy-to-prep material for a little extra dice money :) Happy Adventuring! --One Page Mage (P.S. my patreon has more free adventures like this!)
item.dc:creator: OnePageMage

item.title: My Zatanna Cosplay Improvement
item.description: SnarkyJayCosplay here— was editing and decided to put a little comparison together! I’m really happy with the 2024 version of my Zatanna cosplay— the suit screams “Magician” (it’s more cohesive to me) and the tights are sparkly (what more could anyone want?). Plus my edit is more dynamic: I think it flows better and looks a little more “real?” I’m no photoshop expert by any means, but I’ve certainly improved. 2023 will probably be preferred by some for a number of reasons… but hey, I feel like I’m growing as an artist and wanted to share that.
item.dc:creator: rectalpossum

item.title: Move along! Nothing to see here!
item.dc:creator: LogicDude

item.title: Every morning and every night I send my two adult sons, their SOs, and my wife a batch of memes as an I love you. Dad jokes, words of affirmation, nightmare fuel, oddities, daily theme music. This is my latest batch. Like if you like. Don’t over analyze.
item.description:
Today’s morning theme music // morning jam. Get up! Go to school and/or work. Have a great day. I love you.
I love you. Goodnight.
#dad_jokes
Today’s morning theme music // morning jam. Get up! Go to school and/or work. Have a great day. I love you.
#dad_jokes
Today’s morning theme music // morning jam. Get up! Go to school and/or work. Have a great day. I love you.
#dad_jokes
Within the past nine months, my eldest son has been in two car crashes. His SO had their car hit in a hit in run while parked outside their house. My youngest son was hit in a moving hit and run. My youngest son’s SO rear ended an old lady within hours of me posting this meme. I hate to say it, but this sure gives credence to the actuarial scientists. Damn it. Kids are expensive.
Today’s morning theme music // morning jam. Get up! Go to school and/or work. Have a great day. I love you.
It's going to rain a lot tonight. Make sure you have your thunder buddy. Good night. I love you.
Today’s morning theme music // morning jam. Get up! Go to school and/or work. Have a great day. I love you.
#sweet_dreams
Use your head. #sweet_dreams.
Put it away, cat. We can give you rent money. Stay in school.
He’s all in.
#dad_jokes
Today’s morning theme music // morning jam. Get up! Go to school and/or work. Have a great day. I love you.
Words of affirmation.
Words of affirmation.
#dad_jokes
Today’s morning theme music // morning jam. Get up! Go to school and/or work. Have a great day. I love you.
#cat
#cat
Before you freak out on me like last time, a) I sent this on Wednesday, and b) it’s an omen of foreboding, so it works any day. I love you all. Have a great night. Sweet dreams.
#cat
Be gruntled today. I love you.
The Best cat meme on the Internet. #cat
101 Elmos. Technically not a #cat
#sweet_dreams I love you. Goodnight.
#dad_jokes
Don’t forget to eat. I love you. Have a great day.
Happiness is…wear a condom.
#sweet_dreams. I love you. Goodnight.
#shiny #shinypokemon
Have a great day. I love you. Don’t stare at the turtles. They’re watching.
Everyone say “Hi, Peanut!” Have a great day. I love you.
Do your best today. Even if you’re fat like me. Have a great day. I love you.
Study the classics today. I love you. Have a great day.
#gnomedepot #gnome
Time flies. Call your mother. #dad_jokes
#dad_jokes
I love you. Have a great day.
I love you. Have a great day.
item.dc:creator: Wheretheheckisjason
